name: Structured World Model (SWM) System Architecture
description: Complete architecture of a TypeScript system for extracting, structuring, and manipulating world models from arbitrary input using LLM-based agents and graph operations

entities.name: Chunker Agent
entities.description: Agent responsible for splitting large text inputs into manageable chunks that fit within LLM context limits

entities.name: Extraction Agent
entities.description: Core agent that analyzes input and extracts structured world models using LLM calls

entities.name: Structuring Agent
entities.description: Agent that converts raw extraction output into properly structured world model format with normalized types and ID mapping

entities.name: Validation Agent
entities.description: Agent that validates world model integrity, checking for dangling references and structural issues

entities.name: Second Pass Agent
entities.description: Agent that performs completeness analysis to find implicit entities and relations missed in the first extraction pass

entities.name: Refinement Agent
entities.description: Agent that incrementally refines existing world models with new input, extracting only delta changes

entities.name: Query Agent
entities.description: Agent that answers natural language questions about world models using deterministic graph queries or LLM inference

entities.name: Pipeline
entities.description: Orchestration system that manages the sequential execution of processing stages with timing and callback support

entities.name: World Model
entities.description: Core data structure representing entities, relations, processes, and constraints extracted from input

entities.name: Entity
entities.description: Fundamental building block representing actors, objects, systems, concepts, locations, events, groups, or resources

entities.name: Relation
entities.description: Directed connection between entities with semantic type and optional bidirectionality

entities.name: Process
entities.description: Dynamic sequence of ordered steps with participants, triggers, and outcomes

entities.name: Constraint
entities.description: Rule or invariant that applies to entities with hard or soft severity levels

entities.name: CLI Interface
entities.description: Command-line interface providing commands for modeling, validation, querying, and manipulation operations

entities.name: LLM Client
entities.description: Anthropic Claude client with retry logic, timeout handling, and JSON parsing capabilities

entities.name: Graph Utils
entities.description: Graph analysis utilities for entity lookup, dependency finding, path discovery, and format export

entities.name: Merge System
entities.description: System for merging multiple world models with entity deduplication and ID remapping

entities.name: Timeline System
entities.description: Version control system for tracking world model evolution across snapshots with diff computation

entities.name: Export System
entities.description: Multi-format export system supporting Claude MD, system prompts, MCP schemas, Mermaid, and DOT formats

entities.name: Algebra Operations
entities.description: Set algebra operations for world models including intersection, difference, and overlay functions

entities.name: Schema Validation
entities.description: Zod-based schema validation system for raw extractions and world model structures

entities.name: ID Generator
entities.description: Cryptographic random ID generation system using prefixes for different entity types

entities.name: Input Text
entities.description: Raw input text to be processed, classified by source type (text, code, document, url, conversation, mixed)

entities.name: Chunk
entities.description: Individual text segment with index, total count, content, and token estimate

entities.name: Raw Extraction
entities.description: Unstructured extraction output from LLM containing arrays of entities, relations, processes, and constraints

entities.name: Validation Result
entities.description: Validation outcome containing validity status, issues list, and statistical summary

entities.name: Query Result
entities.description: Query response containing answer, method used, referenced entities, and confidence score

entities.name: Timeline
entities.description: Version history container holding ordered snapshots of world model evolution

entities.name: Snapshot
entities.description: Point-in-time world model state with timestamp, diff from previous, and statistics

entities.name: Diff
entities.description: Comparison result showing added, removed, and modified elements between world model versions

relations.label: splits large inputs into processable chunks
calls LLM for world model extraction
processes raw extraction into structured format
creates structured world model with normalized types and IDs
generates validation outcome with issues and stats
references source and target entities by ID
references participant entities and step actors
applies to entities in scope array
exports world models in various formats
performs inference queries when graph patterns don't match
generates query responses with answers and metadata
merges existing models with delta changes
analyzes existing model to find gaps
validates and coerces LLM extraction output

processes.name: World Model Extraction
processes.description: Multi-stage pipeline that converts raw input into structured world model
processes.trigger: User provides input text with source type

steps.action: Check input size and split into chunks if needed
Extract entities, relations, processes, and constraints from each chunk
Merge raw extractions from multiple chunks if applicable
Convert raw extraction to structured world model with ID mapping
Validate world model integrity and generate issues report

processes.name: Multi-Pass Extraction
processes.description: Enhanced extraction process with additional passes to capture implicit information

steps.action: Execute standard extraction pipeline
Analyze model for implicit entities and missing relations
Structure delta extraction into world model format
Merge original model with delta model
Validate final merged model

processes.name: World Model Query
processes.description: Natural language query processing against world models using graph patterns or LLM inference
processes.trigger: User asks question about world model

steps.action: Parse query against deterministic graph patterns
Fall back to LLM inference if no pattern matches
Extract referenced entities from response

processes.name: Incremental Refinement
processes.description: Update existing world model with new input while preserving existing structure
processes.trigger: User provides new input to refine existing model

steps.action: Summarize existing world model for context
Extract only delta changes from new input
Structure delta extraction into world model
Merge existing model with delta model
Validate merged result

processes.name: Timeline Management
processes.description: Version control for world model evolution with snapshot management and history tracking

steps.action: Create snapshot from current world model
Compute diff from previous snapshot if exists
Add snapshot to timeline with metadata

constraints.name: Entity ID Uniqueness
constraints.description: All entity IDs within a world model must be unique

constraints.name: Relation Reference Integrity
constraints.description: Relations must reference existing entity IDs for both source and target

constraints.name: Process Participant Validity
constraints.description: Process participants and step actors must reference existing entity IDs

constraints.name: Constraint Scope Validity
constraints.description: Constraint scope arrays must reference existing entity IDs

constraints.name: Chunk Size Limit
constraints.description: Individual chunks must not exceed maximum token limit for LLM processing

constraints.name: LLM Response Timeout
constraints.description: LLM calls must complete within configured timeout period

constraints.name: Entity Name Consistency
constraints.description: Entity names should be consistent across merges and not contain only whitespace

constraints.name: Confidence Score Range
constraints.description: All confidence scores must be between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive

constraints.name: CLI Input Validation
constraints.description: CLI commands must receive valid input parameters and file paths

constraints.name: Schema Compliance
constraints.description: All data structures must comply with their respective Zod schemas

metadata.source_summary: TypeScript source code for a comprehensive world model extraction system with CLI, agents, utilities, and export capabilities
extraction_notes: Extracted architectural components from TypeScript modules focusing on data flow and system interactions
Identified agent-based processing pipeline with clear stage dependencies
Captured world model schema with entities, relations, processes, and constraints as core concepts
Mapped CLI command structure to underlying system operations
Noted comprehensive utility systems for graph operations, merging, timeline management, and export formats
System shows sophisticated retry logic, validation, and error handling throughout
